targetMarkets.name: Lehigh Acres, FL
targetMarkets.thesis: Quarter-acre infill vacant lots with repeat builder demand and standard lot patterns.

targetMarkets.name: Cape Coral, FL
targetMarkets.thesis: Utility and canal-premium lot opportunities, but diligence risk is higher.

targetMarkets.name: Ocala, FL
targetMarkets.thesis: New target area: find builders first, then parcel/seller leads that match local buyer demand.

records.name: Precision Gulf Homes
records.buyBox: 0.23-0.32 acre Lehigh infill lots, paved road, no wetlands, $42k max

records.name: Evergreen Land Fund
records.buyBox: Backup buyer; buys only at 60-70% of market value.

records.name: Sunbelt Custom Builders
records.buyBox: Cape Coral utility-confirmed quarter-acre residential lots; canal/seawall premium only after verification.
